attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

438	            <h1>Time, Untangled.</h1>
439	            <p class="subtitle">Welcome to Swimlane—your continuous, infinite-canvas journal.</p>
440	            <ul>
441	                <li><strong>The Infinite Canvas:</strong> Traditional journals trap you in pages. Here, time is fluid. Scroll up into the past, or down into the future. The paper never ends.</li>

444	                <li><strong>Command Palette:</strong> Press <strong>Ctrl + K</strong> (or Cmd + K) to instantly search your entire timeline.</li>

500	<script>
501	    const App = (function() {
502	        
503	        const Config = {
504	            itemTypes: [{ id: 'type-task', label: 'T' }, { id: 'type-milestone', label: 'M' }, { id: 'type-outcome', label: 'O' }],
505	            PAL: ['#4F8EF7', '#8B5CF6', '#10B981', '#F59E0B', '#EF4444', '#06B6D4', '#EC4899', '#84CC16'],
506	            defaultTheme: 'dotted',
507	            dbName: 'SwimlaneDB_V10', 
508	            fallbackKey: 'SwimlaneFallback_V10',
509	            maxRenderedDays: 120
510	        };
511	
512	        const Utils = {
513	            uuid: () => { try { return crypto.randomUUID(); } catch { return 'id_' + Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15); } },
514	            parseDate: (s) => new Date(s + 'T00:00:00'),
515	            toLocalISO: (d) => { const y = d.getFullYear(); const m = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); return `${y}-${m}-${day}`; },
516	            get today() { const d = new Date(); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); return d; },
517	            get todayStr() { return Utils.toLocalISO(this.today); },
518	            getDiffDays: (dateStr) => { return Math.round((Utils.parseDate(dateStr) - Utils.today) / 86400000); },
519	            escape: (str) => String(str || '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, match => ({ '&': '&', '<': '<', '>': '>', '"': '"', "'": ''' })[match])
520	        };
521	
522	        let state = {
523	            version: 10,
524	            lanes: [{ id: 'l_1', title: 'Company', minimized: false, color: '#4F8EF7' }, { id: 'l_2', title: 'Home', minimized: false, color: '#8B5CF6' }, { id: 'l_3', title: 'Admin', minimized: false, color: '#10B981' }],
525	            habits: [ { id: 'h_1', title: 'Workout' }, { id: 'h_2', title: 'Read' }, { id: 'h_3', title: 'Diet' }, { id: 'h_4', title: 'Sleep' } ],
526	            items: [],
527	            notes: [],
528	            habitChecks: {}, 
529	            diary: {},       
530	            settings: { theme: Config.defaultTheme, horizonMode: 'all', habitMode: 'streak', showAchievements: false, showHorizon: false }
531	        };
532	
533	        let uiState = { isNotesOpen: false, activeLaneNotes: null, activeNoteId: null };
534	        let currentUiToday = Utils.todayStr;
535	
536	        const dayMap = new Map();
537	        let renderStartDate = null;
538	        let renderEndDate = null;
539	        let isVirtualizing = false;
540	
541	        const DOM = {
542	            get header() { return document.getElementById('journal-header'); },
543	            get horizon() { return document.getElementById('journal-horizon'); },
544	            get body() { return document.getElementById('journal-body'); },
545	            get topSentinel() { return document.getElementById('top-sentinel'); },
546	            get bottomSentinel() { return document.getElementById('scroll-sentinel'); },
547	            get searchOverlay() { return document.getElementById('search-overlay'); },
548	            get searchInput() { return document.getElementById('search-input'); },
549	            get searchResults() { return document.getElementById('search-results'); },
550	            get onboarding() { return document.getElementById('onboarding-overlay'); },
551	            get importUpload() { return document.getElementById('import-upload'); },
552	            get notesOverlay() { return document.getElementById('notes-overlay'); },
553	            get notesDrawer() { return document.getElementById('notes-drawer'); },
554	            get notesLaneTitle() { return document.getElementById('notes-drawer-lane-title'); },
555	            get notesTabs() { return document.getElementById('notes-tabs'); },
556	            get noteEditor() { return document.getElementById('note-editor'); },
557	            get noteEmptyState() { return document.getElementById('note-empty-state'); },
558	            get noteTitleInput() { return document.getElementById('note-title-input'); },
559	            get noteBodyInput() { return document.getElementById('note-text-input'); },
560	            get toast() { return document.getElementById('undo-toast'); }
561	        };
562	
563	        const EventBus = {
564	            listeners: {},
565	            on(event, cb) { if(!this.listeners[event]) this.listeners[event] = []; this.listeners[event].push(cb); },
566	            off(event, cb) { if(this.listeners[event]) this.listeners[event] = this.listeners[event].filter(l => l !== cb); },
567	            clear() { this.listeners = {}; },
568	            emit(event, data) { if(this.listeners[event]) this.listeners[event].forEach(cb => cb(data)); }
569	        };
570	
571	        let undoTimer;
572	        const Undo = {
573	            stack: [], max: 20,
574	            snap(label = 'Action') {
575	                this.stack.push({ label, stateData: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state)) });
576	                if(this.stack.length > this.max) this.stack.shift();
577	            },
578	            perform() {
579	                if(!this.stack.length) return;
580	                const snap = this.stack.pop();
581	                state = snap.stateData;
582	                Store.save(); applySettings(); Render.hardRebuild();
583	                this.showToast('Undid: ' + snap.label);
584	            },
585	            showToast(msg) {
586	                document.getElementById('undo-msg').innerText = msg;
587	                DOM.toast.classList.add('is-active');
588	                clearTimeout(undoTimer); undoTimer = setTimeout(() => DOM.toast.classList.remove('is-active'), 3500);
589	            }
590	        };
591	
592	        const Store = {
593	            useIDB: false, db: null,
594	            init() {
595	                // Keep IndexedDB init to check for legacy client data to migrate
596	                return new Promise((resolve) => {
597	                    try {
598	                        if (!window.indexedDB) return resolve();
599	                        const req = indexedDB.open(Config.dbName, 1);
600	                        req.onupgradeneeded = e => { e.target.result.createObjectStore('state'); };
601	                        req.onsuccess = e => { this.db = e.target.result; this.useIDB = true; resolve(); };
602	                        req.onerror = e => { resolve(); };
603	                    } catch (e) { resolve(); }
604	                });
605	            },
606	            async load() {
607	                // 1. Check for legacy client-side data to migrate
608	                let legacyData = null;
609	                try {
610	                    legacyData = await new Promise(resolve => {
611	                        if (this.useIDB && this.db) {
612	                            const tx = this.db.transaction('state', 'readonly');
613	                            const req = tx.objectStore('state').get('appData');
614	                            req.onsuccess = () => resolve(req.result);
615	                            req.onerror = () => resolve(this.loadFallbackLegacy());
616	                        } else {
617	                            resolve(this.loadFallbackLegacy());
618	                        }
619	                    });
620	                } catch(e) {
621	                    console.warn("Legacy load failed:", e);
622	                }
623	
624	                // 2. Fetch active state from the Python backend server
625	                try {
626	                    const response = await fetch('/api/state');
627	                    if (response.ok) {
628	                        const serverData = await response.json();
629	                        if (serverData && Object.keys(serverData).length > 0) {
630	                            // Backend database is initialized; load server state
631	                            this.hydrate(serverData);
632	                            console.log("Journal loaded successfully from backend database.");
633	                        } else if (legacyData && Object.keys(legacyData).length > 0) {
634	                            // Backend database is empty, but legacy local data exists: bootstrap backend
635	                            console.log("Bootstrapping backend database with legacy local data...");
636	                            this.hydrate(legacyData);
637	                            await this.saveToServer(legacyData);
638	                            
639	                            // Clean up legacy local storage after successful bootstrap
640	                            this.clearLegacy();
641	                        } else {
642	                            console.log("No data found on backend or locally. Starting fresh.");
643	                        }
644	                    } else {
645	                        console.error("Backend returned error status:", response.status);
646	                        if (legacyData) this.hydrate(legacyData);
647	                    }
648	                } catch (e) {
649	                    console.error("Failed to connect to backend server. Falling back to local data.", e);
650	                    if (legacyData) this.hydrate(legacyData);
651	                }
652	            },
653	            loadFallbackLegacy() {
654	                try {
655	                    const raw = localStorage.getItem(Config.fallbackKey);
656	                    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
657	                } catch(e) {
658	                    return null;
659	                }
660	            },
661	            clearLegacy() {
662	                try {
663	                    localStorage.removeItem(Config.fallbackKey);
664	                    if (this.useIDB && this.db) {
665	                        const tx = this.db.transaction('state', 'readwrite');
666	                        tx.objectStore('state').delete('appData');
667	                    }
668	                } catch(e) {
669	                    console.warn("Could not clear legacy local storage:", e);
670	                }
671	            },
672	            hydrate(data) {
673	                if(!data) return;
674	                state.lanes = data.lanes || state.lanes;
675	                state.lanes.forEach((l, i) => { if(!l.color) l.color = Config.PAL[i % Config.PAL.length]; });
676	                state.diary = data.diary || {};
677	                state.notes = data.notes || []; 
678	                state.settings = { ...state.settings, ...(data.settings || {}) };
679	                state.items = (data.items || []).filter(i => i.id && i.dateStr && i.laneId && i.type);
680	                
681	                if (data.habits && typeof data.habits[0] === 'string') {
682	                    state.habits = data.habits.map((h, i) => ({ id: 'h_' + i, title: h }));
683	                    Object.keys(data.habitChecks || {}).forEach(date => {
684	                        const newChecks = {}; Object.keys(data.habitChecks[date]).forEach(oldIdx => { newChecks['h_' + oldIdx] = data.habitChecks[date][oldIdx]; });
685	                        state.habitChecks[date] = newChecks;
686	                    });
687	                } else {
688	                    state.habits = data.habits || state.habits;
689	                    state.habitChecks = data.checks || data.habitChecks || {};
690	                }
691	            },
692	            async save() {
693	                try {
694	                    await this.saveToServer(state);
695	                } catch (e) {
696	                    console.error("Autosave to backend failed:", e);
697	                }
698	            },

735	                        state.lanes = state.lanes.filter(l => l.id !== id);

739	                    }, 'structureChanged'); 
740	                }
741	            },

743	            updateLaneTitle(id, val) { this.mutate(() => { const l = state.lanes.find(x => x.id === id); if(l) l.title = val; }, 'silentSave'); },

750

763	            
764	            updateDiary(d, val) { this.mutate(() => { if(val.trim()==='') delete state.diary[d]; else state.diary[d] = val; }, 'silentSave'); },
765	
766	            addItem(dateStr, laneId) {

796	            reorderTrack(id, newDate, newLane, domIds) {
797	                const item = state.items.find(x => x.id === id);
798	                if (!item) return;
799	                const oldDateStr = item.dateStr;

801	                this.mutate(() => {
802	                    item.dateStr = newDate; item.laneId = newLane;
803	                    const trackItems = []; const otherItems = [];
804	                    state.items.forEach(i => { if (domIds.includes(i.id)) trackItems.push(i); else otherItems.push(i); });
805	                    trackItems.sort((a, b) => domIds.indexOf(a.id) - domIds.indexOf(b.id));
806	                    state.items = [...otherItems, ...trackItems];
807	                }, 'itemsMoved', { oldDateStr, newDateStr: newDate });
808	            },

863	                BusWrap('structureChanged', () => this.hardRebuild());

865	                BusWrap('horizonToggled', () => {
866	                    const btn = document.querySelector('[data-action="toggleHorizon"]');
867	                    if(btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', state.settings.showHorizon);
868	                    DOM.horizon.classList.toggle('is-expanded', state.settings.showHorizon);
869	                    if(state.settings.showHorizon) { VirtualScroll.seekToDate(Utils.todayStr); this.horizonData(); }

874	                BusWrap('itemsChanged', (p) => {

876	                    this.horizonData(); this.updateDayToggles(); this.updateProgress();
877	                });
878	                BusWrap('itemsMoved', (p) => {
879	                    if(p) { this.trackContent(p.oldDateStr); if(p.oldDateStr !== p.newDateStr) this.trackContent(p.newDateStr); }
880	                    this.horizonData(); this.updateDayToggles(); this.updateProgress();
881	                });
882	                BusWrap('itemToggled', (p) => {
883	                    if(p && p.id) {

885	                        if(item) document.querySelectorAll(`.item[data-id="${p.id}"]`).forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('is-done', item.isDone));
886	                    }
887	                    this.horizonData(); this.updateProgress();
888	                });
889	                BusWrap('horizonChanged', () => this.horizonData());
890	                BusWrap('habitsChanged', () => this.habitStats());
891	                
892	                BusWrap('notesChanged', () => { if(uiState.isNotesOpen) this.notesDrawerUI(); });
893	                BusWrap('notesTabsChanged', () => { if(uiState.isNotesOpen) this.notesDrawerTabsOnly(); });

1043	            horizonData() {
1044	                if(!state.settings.showHorizon) return;
1045	                const sysToday = Utils.todayStr;
1046	
1047	                state.lanes.forEach(lane => {
1048	                    const bin = document.getElementById(`overdue-bin-${lane.id}`);
1049	                    const sec = document.getElementById(`overdue-sec-${lane.id}`);
1050	                    if(bin && sec) {
1051	                        bin.innerHTML = '';
1052	                        const overdue = state.items.filter(i => i.laneId === lane.id && !i.isDone && i.dateStr < sysToday);
1053	                        if (overdue.length > 0) {
1054	                            overdue.forEach(itemData => {
1055	                                const itemEl = document.createElement('div');
1056	                                itemEl.className = `item sl-${lane.id} ${itemData.type} is-clone is-overdue`;
1057	                                itemEl.dataset.id = itemData.id;
1058	                                itemEl.innerHTML = Render.itemHTML(itemData);
1059	                                bin.appendChild(itemEl);
1060	                            });
1061	                            sec.style.display = 'block';
1062	                        } else {
1063	                            sec.style.display = 'none';
1064	                        }
1065	                    }
1066	
1067	                    const container = document.getElementById(`hz-${lane.id}`);
1068	                    if(container) {
1069	                        container.innerHTML = ''; 
1070	                        const ul = document.createElement('ul'); ul.className = 'index-list';
1071	                        const hzItems = state.items.filter(i => { return i.laneId === lane.id && (i.type === 'type-outcome' || i.type === 'type-milestone') && (i.dateStr >= sysToday || i.isDone); });
1072	                        const mapped = hzItems.map(item => { if (!state.settings.showAchievements && item.isDone) return null; return { ...item, diffDays: Utils.getDiffDays(item.dateStr) }; }).filter(i => i !== null).sort((a, b) => a.diffDays - b.diffDays);
1073	
1074	                        mapped.forEach(data => {
1075	                            const li = document.createElement('li');
1076	                            li.dataset.date = data.dateStr; li.dataset.id = data.id; li.classList.add('item', `sl-${lane.id}`); 
1077	                            if (data.type === 'type-milestone') li.classList.add('type-m-index');
1078	                            if (data.isDone) li.classList.add('is-done');
